# ELI ‚Äî Capabilities & Actions (with activation phrases)

*Auto-generated 2026-06-08 from `capability_manifest.json` (205 capabilities; 175 routable). Regenerated by `eli/tools/registry/capabilities_doc.py` alongside the manifest.*

**How to read this:** every row is a real action ELI can route to and
execute. Activation phrases are **representative** ‚Äî the router is
paraphrase- and typo-tolerant; a phrase shows the *shape* that fires the
action, not the only accepted wording. `Plugin` = backed by a plugin (rest
are core executor+router). Voice users prefix with the wake word
(‚Äúcomputer, ‚Ä¶‚Äù). Generation actions (documents/scripts/projects) run the
evidence-planner first (real code/web/memory analysis) before synthesising.


## Conversation & persona

| Action | What it does | Example activation phrase(s) | Source |
|---|---|---|---|
| `CHAT` | Open conversation / fallback; persona-bound reply | anything not matching a command ¬∑ ‚Äúhow are you‚Äù ¬∑ ‚Äútell me a story‚Äù | Core |
| `EXPLAIN_LAST_RESPONSE` | Explain why ELI gave its previous answer | ‚Äúwhy did you say that‚Äù ¬∑ ‚Äúexplain your last response‚Äù | Core |
| `CLEAR_CHAT_HISTORY` | Clear the current chat history | ‚Äúclear chat history‚Äù ¬∑ ‚Äústart a new chat‚Äù | Core |
| `PERSONA_LOCK_SET` | Pin a persona/role for the session | ‚Äúlock your persona to X‚Äù | Core |
| `PERSONA_LOCK_CLEAR` | Release a pinned persona | ‚Äúclear persona lock‚Äù | Core |
| `PERSONA_LOCK_STATUS` | Show the current persona lock | ‚Äúwhat persona are you locked to‚Äù | Core |
| `HELP` | List what ELI can do | ‚Äúhelp‚Äù ¬∑ ‚Äúwhat commands do you have‚Äù | Core |
| `LIST_CAPABILITIES` | Enumerate ELI's capabilities | ‚Äúwhat can you do‚Äù ¬∑ ‚Äúlist your capabilities‚Äù | Core |
| `MULTI_COMMAND` | Run several chained commands from one utterance, in order | ‚Äúclose steam and set an alarm for 7am‚Äù ¬∑ ‚Äúopen spotify then play X‚Äù | Core |

## App & window control

| Action | What it does | Example activation phrase(s) | Source |
|---|---|---|---|
| `OPEN_APP` | Launch an application (installs it if missing) | ‚Äúopen spotify‚Äù ¬∑ ‚Äúlaunch firefox‚Äù | Core |
| `CLOSE_APP` | Close an application | ‚Äúclose spotify‚Äù ¬∑ ‚Äúquit chrome‚Äù | Core |
| `FOCUS_APP` | Bring an app's window to the front | ‚Äúfocus firefox‚Äù ¬∑ ‚Äúswitch to the browser‚Äù | Core |
| `OPEN_BROWSER` | Open the default web browser | ‚Äúopen the browser‚Äù | Core |
| `OPEN_URL` | Open a URL in the browser | ‚Äúopen github.com‚Äù ¬∑ ‚Äúgo to youtube.com‚Äù | Core |
| `OPEN_IDE` | Open the code IDE | ‚Äúopen the IDE‚Äù | Core |
| `OPEN_FILE_SYSTEM` | Open the file manager | ‚Äúopen files‚Äù ¬∑ ‚Äúopen the file manager‚Äù | Core |
| `OPEN_SYSTEM_SETTINGS` | Open OS settings | ‚Äúopen system settings‚Äù | Core |
| `OPEN_AUDIO_SETTINGS` | Open sound settings | ‚Äúopen audio settings‚Äù | Core |
| `OPEN_POWER_SETTINGS` | Open power settings | ‚Äúopen power settings‚Äù | Core |
| `OPEN_NETWORK_BROWSER` | Open network settings | ‚Äúopen network settings‚Äù | Core |
| `OPEN_COMMUNICATION_HUB` | Open the comms hub (mail/chat apps) | ‚Äúopen communication hub‚Äù | Core |
| `OPEN_MEDIA_HUB` | Open the media hub | ‚Äúopen media hub‚Äù | Core |
| `TILE_WINDOWS` | Tile windows in a grid | ‚Äútile windows‚Äù ¬∑ ‚Äú2x2 grid‚Äù ¬∑ ‚Äú4x2‚Äù | Core |
| `MAXIMISE_WINDOW` | Maximise the focused window | ‚Äúmaximise the window‚Äù | Core |
| `MINIMISE_ALL` | Minimise all / show desktop | ‚Äúminimise everything‚Äù ¬∑ ‚Äúshow desktop‚Äù | Core |
| `NEXT_WINDOW` | Switch to the next window | ‚Äúnext window‚Äù | Core |
| `PREVIOUS_WINDOW` | Switch to the previous window | ‚Äúprevious window‚Äù | Core |
| `RESTORE_WINDOWS` | Restore minimised windows | ‚Äúrestore windows‚Äù | Core |
| `SWITCH_WORKSPACE` | Switch virtual desktop/workspace | ‚Äúswitch to workspace 2‚Äù | Core |
| `SMART_HOME` | Control smart-home devices | ‚Äúturn off the lights‚Äù | Plugin |
| `CONFIRM_PENDING_REMEDIATION` | Approve a pending fix/install offer | ‚Äúyes‚Äù (to an ‚Äúinstall X?‚Äù offer) | Core |
| `CANCEL_PENDING_REMEDIATION` | Decline a pending fix/install offer | ‚Äúno‚Äù (to an ‚Äúinstall X?‚Äù offer) | Core |

## Voice

| Action | What it does | Example activation phrase(s) | Source |
|---|---|---|---|
| `DICTATE` | Start/stop dictation into the active field | ‚Äústart dictation‚Äù ¬∑ ‚Äústop dictating‚Äù | Core |
| `TRANSCRIBE` | Transcribe an audio file | ‚Äútranscribe audio.wav‚Äù | Core |
| `SPEAK` | Speak text aloud (TTS) | ‚Äúsay good morning‚Äù | Plugin |
| `LISTEN_FOR_COMMAND` | Start listening for a voice command | ‚Äúlisten‚Äù / the wake word ‚Äúcomputer‚Äù | Core |
| `VOICE_DIAGNOSTICS` | Run voice/STT diagnostics | ‚Äúrun voice diagnostics‚Äù ¬∑ ‚Äústt diagnostics‚Äù | Core |
| `WAKE_SET` | Set your own wake word (any phrase); ELI persists it and trains the detector on it | ‚Äúchange the wake word to athena‚Äù ¬∑ ‚Äúset my wake word to jarvis‚Äù | Core |
| `WAKE_TRAIN` | Train the local, self-supervised wake-word model (Piper-synth + noise/music augmentation; robust over background music) | ‚Äútrain the wake word‚Äù | Core |
| `WAKE_ENROLL` | Record your voice saying the wake word and retrain (personalisation, over music) | ‚Äúenroll my wake word‚Äù | Core |
| `TRAIN_VOICE` | Learn your voice + tone ‚Äî pitch/energy/rate, happy/angry/excited, and question-vs-statement; ELI then adapts its delivery to how you sound | ‚Äútrain my voice‚Äù ¬∑ ‚Äúlearn how I speak‚Äù | Core |

## Generation (docs/code)

| Action | What it does | Example activation phrase(s) | Source |
|---|---|---|---|
| `GENERATE_DOCUMENT` | Grounded document via the multi-stage pipeline (evidence ‚Üí plan/outline ‚Üí sections ‚Üí review‚Üírevise) | ‚Äúgenerate a document about X‚Äù ¬∑ ‚Äúwrite a report on Y‚Äù | Core |
| `CREATE_DOCUMENT` | Multi-stage grounded document (plan‚Üídraft‚Üíreview); single-pass fallback | ‚Äúcreate a document on X‚Äù | Core |
| `DATA_FABRICATOR` | Generate synthetic/test data | ‚Äúfabricate a test dataset for X‚Äù | Core |
| `GENERATE_SCRIPT` | Generate a runnable script via the coding agent | ‚Äúwrite a bash script to monitor the GPU‚Äù | Core |
| `GENERATE_PROJECT` | Scaffold a multi-file project | ‚Äúgenerate a project that does X‚Äù | Core |
| `CODE_SOLVE` | Solve a coding task (plan‚ÜíDAG‚Üíverify‚Üírepair) | ‚Äúsolve this: ‚Ä¶‚Äù ¬∑ ‚Äúimplement function X‚Äù | Core |
| `FIX_FILE` | Find and fix bugs in a file | ‚Äúfix the bugs in foo.py‚Äù | Core |
| `EXAMINE_CODE` | Tiered error scan of named files/codebase | ‚Äúexamine eli/memory/memory.py for errors‚Äù ¬∑ ‚Äúreview the codebase for bugs‚Äù | Core |
| `CONFIRM_CODE_FIX` | Apply the offered code fixes (pending-confirm) | ‚Äúyes, fix it‚Äù ¬∑ ‚Äúfix the logic ones too‚Äù | Core |
| `CANCEL_CODE_FIX` | Decline the offered code fixes | ‚Äúno, leave it‚Äù | Core |
| `SHOW_DIFF` | Show a code diff | ‚Äúshow the diff‚Äù | Core |
| `OPEN_IN_IDE` | Open a generated artifact in the IDE | (post-action; auto after generate) | Core |

## Grounded introspection

| Action | What it does | Example activation phrase(s) | Source |
|---|---|---|---|
| `RUNTIME_STATUS` | Live runtime: model, ctx, GPU layers, batch | ‚Äúwhat are you running on‚Äù ¬∑ ‚Äúruntime status ‚Äî everything‚Äù | Core |
| `RUNTIME_AUDIT` | Full runtime audit (what's broken/missing) | ‚Äúrun a full runtime audit‚Äù | Core |
| `IMPORT_AUDIT` | Which imports are failing/missing | ‚Äúwhat imports are failing‚Äù | Core |
| `RESOLVE_RUNTIME_PATHS` | Resolved paths of critical files | ‚Äúshow the resolved runtime paths‚Äù | Core |
| `GUI_RUNTIME_AUDIT` | Audit GUI wiring with file-read proof | ‚Äúaudit your gui file‚Äù ¬∑ ‚Äúscan the gui runtime wiring and prove every hook‚Äù | Core |
| `DIAGNOSE_WRAPPERS` | Show the executor middleware/wrapper chain | ‚Äúshow the executor wrapper chain‚Äù | Core |
| `COGNITION_STATUS` | Cognition runtime status | ‚Äúcognition status‚Äù | Core |
| `EXPLAIN_COGNITION_RUNTIME` | Explain the cognition runtime verbatim | ‚Äúexplain your cognition runtime‚Äù | Core |
| `MEMORY_STATUS` | Memory subsystem status / counts | ‚Äúhow does your memory work‚Äù | Core |
| `MEMORY_STATS` | Memory statistics | ‚Äúmemory stats‚Äù | Core |
| `EXPLAIN_MEMORY_RUNTIME` | Explain the memory runtime verbatim (4 DBs) | ‚Äúexplain exactly how your memory works internally‚Äù | Core |
| `AWARENESS_STATUS` | What ELI is currently aware of | ‚Äúwhat are you aware of‚Äù | Core |
| `FRONTIER_STATUS` | Full system wiring matrix | ‚Äúrun a full system wiring matrix‚Äù | Core |
| `ELI_IDENTITY_AUDIT` | Audit ELI's identity provenance | ‚Äúaudit your identity‚Äù | Core |
| `CODE_CHANGES` | Recent code changes | ‚Äúwhat code has changed‚Äù | Core |
| `NAME_SOURCE_AUDIT` | Where ELI's knowledge of your name comes from | ‚Äúhow do you know my name‚Äù | Core |
| `REASONING_MODE_STATUS` | Current reasoning mode | ‚Äúwhat reasoning mode are you in‚Äù | Core |
| `EXPLAIN_ALL_REASONING_MODES` | Describe all 5 reasoning modes | ‚Äúexplain all your reasoning modes‚Äù | Core |
| `SELF_REPORT` | What ELI has recently done/worked on | ‚Äúwhat have you been working on‚Äù | Core |

| Action | What it does | Example activation phrase(s) | Source |
|---|---|---|---|
| `MEMORY_STORE` | Store a durable fact | ‚Äúremember that my sister's name is Anna‚Äù | Core |
| `MEMORY_RECALL` | Recall stored facts | ‚Äúwhat do you remember about my car‚Äù | Core |
| `PERSONAL_MEMORY_SUMMARY` | Summary of what ELI knows about you | ‚Äúwhat do you know about me‚Äù | Core |
| `PERSONAL_MEMORY_DEEP_EXPLAIN` | Deep, sourced profile explanation | ‚Äúexplain everything you know about me and where it's stored‚Äù | Core |
| `USER_IDENTITY_SUMMARY` | Who the user is | ‚Äúwho am I‚Äù | Core |
| `REFRESH_USER_INFO` | Re-extract the user profile | ‚Äúrefresh my user info‚Äù | Core |
| `SET_USER_NAME` | Set/correct the user's name | ‚Äúmy name is Alex‚Äù ¬∑ ‚Äúcall me Alex‚Äù | Core |

## Self-maintenance

| Action | What it does | Example activation phrase(s) | Source |
|---|---|---|---|
| `SELF_ANALYZE` | Analyse own failures/metrics | ‚Äúanalyse your failures‚Äù | Core |
| `SELF_IMPROVE` | Run a self-improvement patch cycle | ‚Äúimprove yourself‚Äù | Core |
| `SELF_PATCH` | Apply a self-improvement patch | ‚Äúpatch yourself‚Äù | Core |
| `SELF_IMPROVEMENT_LOG` | Show the self-improvement log | ‚Äúshow your self-improvement log‚Äù | Core |
| `SELF_UPGRADE` | git pull ‚Üí deps ‚Üí rebuild indexes | ‚Äúupgrade yourself‚Äù | Core |
| `SELF_UPDATE` | Self-update (control-contract) | ‚Äúupdate yourself‚Äù | Core |
| `SELF_TEST` | Run internal self-tests | ‚Äúrun a self test‚Äù | Core |
| `RUN_TESTS` | Run the pytest suite and summarise the results document | ‚Äúrun the test suite‚Äù ¬∑ ‚Äúgenerate a test report‚Äù | Core |
| `GENERATE_TESTS` | ELI writes + sandbox-verifies behavioural tests for its own functions (Phase 4) | ‚Äúgenerate tests for your code‚Äù ¬∑ ‚Äúgrow your test coverage‚Äù | Core |
| `LORA_STATUS` | Report LoRA fine-tune readiness (preflight: modules, base model, reviewed data) | ‚Äúlora status‚Äù ¬∑ ‚Äúis lora ready‚Äù | Core |
| `LORA_TRAIN` | Run the LoRA training pipeline DAG (preflight‚Üíbuild‚Üítrain‚Üíeval); dry-run from chat, real training via the overnight task | ‚Äútrain a lora‚Äù ¬∑ ‚Äúfine-tune yourself‚Äù | Core |
| `ORCHESTRATION_STATUS` | Explain the agent DAG orchestrator: execution layers, dependencies, critical path, and last run | ‚Äúorchestration status‚Äù ¬∑ ‚Äúshow your agent dag‚Äù | Core |
| `TEST_REVIEW` | Run the suite, back up the report + write an errors file, summarise results, and offer result-driven fix options | ‚Äútest review‚Äù ¬∑ ‚Äúrun the tests and tell me what to fix‚Äù | Core |

## Aliases & internal actions (not directly user-triggered)

Synonyms normalised to a routable action, post-actions, or internal pipeline steps:

`ANSWER`, `CHECK_TARGET_STATUS`, `CLOSE_APPLICATION`, `CREATE_DOC`, `CREATE_SCRIPT`, `DIRECT_RESPONSE`, `DOC_GENERATE`, `EXIT_APP`, `EXPLAIN_LAST_FAILURE`, `GENERATE_CODE`, `HIDE_APP`, `IMAGE_STATUS`, `LAUNCH_APP`, `MINIMISE_APP`, `MINIMISE_WINDOW`, `MINIMIZE_APP`, `MINIMIZE_WINDOW`, `OPEN_APPLICATION`, `PLUGIN_STATUS`, `PREPARE_REMEDIATION`, `QUIT_APP`, `SAY`, `SEQUENCE_STEP`, `SET_AI_MODE`, `STT_DIAGNOSTICS`, `TEMPLATE`, `USER_INFO_REPORT`, `WRITE_CODE`, `WRITE_DOCUMENT`, `WRITE_SCRIPT`


## Coverage

- Routable actions documented: **175/175**
